node.description:
__Height:__ 180 cm

A first-year high school student who began living alone at the start of the semester. He is poor at every type of housework and leads a self-indulgent life. He has few friends and tends to put himself down.

__Height:__ 155 cm

A classmate who lives next door to Amane. She is the most beautiful girl in school. She's well-behaved, gets great grades, always wears a smile, and is called an angel by her peers. Because of her beauty, she is very popular for the male student population at school. Due to this, Mahiru tended to avoid her male classmates in the beginning of the story.
Handsome, smart and kind boy. He is the most popular boy in his year, often called the Prince. He has good grades, and is a target of many girls.

She is the girlfriend of Itsuki Akazawa. An active and light-headed person, Chitose is extremely honest with her words. Thanks to her energetic personality, she was able to befriend Mahiru Shiina and allow her to show her true personality more.

Itsuki is the best friend of [Amane Fujimiya](https://anilist.co/character/195601/Amane-Fujimiya) and boyfriend of [Chitose Shirakawa](https://anilist.co/character/230208/Chitose-Shirakawa).

He is really honest, although he is sometimes impulsive, acting before thinking, which has caused him trouble.

Husband of [Shihoko Fujimiya](https://anilist.co/character/296639/) and the father of [Amane Fujimiya](https://anilist.co/character/195601/). Shuuto is described as a man who "doesn't look like his age".
